% LaTeX/Beamer preamble — xelatex / lualatex
% Generated by /course-maker course init. Edit freely.
% Engine-specific packages: fontspec + polyglossia (required; incompatible with fontenc/inputenc).

\documentclass[aspectratio=169, 10pt]{beamer}

% ── Theme ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\usetheme{Madrid}
\usecolortheme{default}
\setbeamertemplate{navigation symbols}{}
\setbeamertemplate{footline}[frame number]

% ── Packages ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\usepackage{fontspec}
\usepackage{polyglossia}
\setmainlanguage{english}     % replace with course language: russian, french, german, etc.
% \setotherlanguage{russian}  % uncomment if mixing languages
\usepackage{amsmath, amssymb, amsfonts}
\usepackage{graphicx}
\usepackage{booktabs}
\usepackage{tikz}
\usetikzlibrary{arrows.meta, positioning, shapes.geometric}
\usepackage{xcolor}

% ── Colors ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\definecolor{mainblue}{RGB}{46,64,87}
\definecolor{accent}{RGB}{232,72,85}

% ── Title info ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\title{[Course name]}
\subtitle{[Lecture] N. [Title]}   % Claude fills: course-language word, lecture number, title
\author{[Author]}
\institute{[Institution]}
\date{[Date]}
